name: ASRock B760M-HDV/M.2 D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - D-Sub - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B760M-HDV/M.2 D4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Budget Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support and basic video outputs.
